initial_prompt: In the project at {workdir}, this java permission_denial fails: Gradle cache permission denied — redirect GRADLE_USER_HOME to writable directory. Reproduce the failure with `rm -rf .gradle && mkdir -p .gradle && chmod 444 .gradle && javac CacheTest.java && java CacheTest; RESULT=$?; chmod 755 .gradle && rm -rf .gradle; exit $RESULT`, diagnose the root cause by reading the project files, and apply a fix so that same command exits 0.

success_criteria.fix_command_test: cd {workdir} && rm -rf .gradle && mkdir -p .gradle && chmod 444 .gradle && javac CacheTest.java && java CacheTest; RESULT=$?; chmod 755 .gradle && rm -rf .gradle; exit $RESULT
